title: RolyPoly
description: a fabric 1.21.1 mod that adds isopods to Minecraft
body:
RolyPoly is a mod that adds a tameable Isopod mob to Minecraft.\
Protect your crops from this little menace who rolls up in his shell!\
this mod adds:
- A bugnet to catch isopods like in a bundle that can be upgraded with a wind charge in your offhand.
- Isopods that can scare off certain mobs like creepers or zombies and squeak while they are nearby

This mod is based on [WhimsyNymph's isopod idea for minecraft](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Ha_yKKNAx9Y)
